---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Data visualization and storytelling projects

### [Mapping *Crotaphytus collaris* sightings in Oklahoma](projects/collared-lizard.qmd)
A spatial visualization project using observational biodiversity data to examine distribution patterns and likely sources of sampling bias.

### [What do PhD graduates do after graduation?](projects/phd-careers.qmd)
A project using doctorate outcome data to visualize career pathways and trends across sectors.

### [Teaching-heavy careers and training gaps](projects/teaching-training.qmd)
A project exploring the relationship between career outcomes and the preparation doctoral students receive for communication and teaching.
